description: Create a Digital Terrain Model (TIN/MDT) from the survey data located at 'C:\workspace\data\site_survey_with_building.csv'. Remove the terrain interpolation inside the building footprint defined by point IDs 101, 102, 103, and 104, ensuring there is a void in the terrain where the building sits. Export the modified terrain model as an AutoCAD DXF file containing the 3D faces to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\terrain_with_void.dxf'. The final DXF must preserve the surrounding terrain but contain no triangles inside the building footprint.
